narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 4-E (precinct in Lorain County) has 730 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
